prompt: Create a polished Remotion micro-lesson explaining gradient descent as a ball rolling down a loss curve. Use a dark academic visual style, animated curve, moving dot, and two concise labels.
Create a Remotion flashcard animation for spaced repetition. Show a question side, then a smooth flip-like reveal to the answer side, with a small next-review badge.
Create a Remotion knowledge graph animation with five concept nodes. Animate one path lighting up from prerequisite to target concept, with labels readable on a cream background.
Create a Remotion quiz feedback card where the selected answer becomes correct, lifts slightly, and triggers a compact explanation panel. Use a premium mobile learning-app aesthetic.
Create a Remotion data visualization showing a memory decay curve and three review pulses that lift the curve. Use an off-white background, black axis labels, and one bright accent color.
Create a Remotion study streak calendar animation. Reveal seven day tiles, mark completed days with animated checkmarks, and end with a bold streak number.
Create a Remotion AI tutor chat animation. Show a student question, the tutor breaking the answer into two steps, and a final highlighted takeaway. Use staggered message entrances.
Create a Remotion course progress hero with a large animated percentage, three module chips, and a subtle moving gradient background. Keep it self-contained and deterministic.
Create a Remotion comparison animation contrasting active recall and rereading. Use two side-by-side panels, animated score bars, and a final winner badge.
Create a Remotion formula-building animation for compound interest. Introduce P, r, n, and t one by one, then assemble the final formula in a clean editorial layout.
